title: ESBMC-PLC 2.0: Formal Verification of Graphical PLCopen XML Ladder Diagram Programs Using SMT-Based Model Checking
description:
Artefact for ESBMC-PLC 2.0 — extends ESBMC-PLC to support graphical PLCopen XML (tc6_0201) programs exported by vendor tools including CONTROLLINO/OpenPLC Editor, Beremiz, and OpenPLC Tutorials.

Contains:
- DFS graph resolver (C++): plcopen_xml_parser.cpp
- Python prototype: tools/ld-graphical-converter/graphical_to_textual.py
- 4 graphical LD benchmarks from 2 real vendor tools
- 25 graphical LD programs validated, all SAFE in under 70ms

Related artefact (ESBMC-PLC 1.0): https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20680071
